titleStmt.title: SII 22.260: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 260. (A.R. No. 260 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, NARASAMAṄGALAM. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE ON HILL—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. JAT. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYA I—7th YEAR (A.D. 1257-58).

summary.p: The inscription commences with introduction Samasta jagad ādhāra etc., which is however a short one in this case. The details of the date are given as Vriśchika, ba. 3, Monday, Mrigaśīrsha corresponding to A.D. 1256, November 4. The record is incomplete stopping with the mention of one Puṇḍravardhana Nārāyaṇa-Bhaṭṭa, a nambi performing worship in the temple of Aruḷāḷa-Perumāḷ at Tiruvattiyūr a quarter of Tēnai Perumbākkam, and of another person, a resident of Dūśi Agaram, to whom the ūravar of Narasamaṅgalam in Māvaṇḍūr nāḍu a division of Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam are said to have sold their village in public auction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastajagadāthāra somakulatila(tila)ka madhurāpuri mādhava keraḷa vamśa nirmūlana laṅkādvivaluṇṭana dvitiyarāma coḷa kulaśai
lakuliśa karṇāṭarāja vidrāṇa kāṅka karikūṭapākala vividharipu durgamardana vira gaṇḍa gopāla vipinadāvadahana kādvipuravarādhiśvara gaṇapati
hariṇa śārdūla nellūrapura viracita virābhiṣeka praṇatarāja pratiṣṭhākhaka mahārājādhirāja parameśvara tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti śrī koṟcaṭapaṉmarāṉa cuntarapā
ṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 7vatu virucciya nāyaṟṟu Amarapakṣattu tṛtiyai yum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mirukaciriṣattu nāḷ Ūrvilaiyāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇ
ṭalattuk kāliyūṟkoṭṭattu māvaṇṭur nāṭṭu naraiciṅkamaṅkalattu Ū(r)ravarom Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa
Iṉṉaraiciṅkamaṅkalam koḷviruḷaroveṉṟu kūṟa Immoḻi keṭṭu Itaṟku Etirmoḻi koṭutto
m Immaṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu Akaram teṉaipperumpākkattu tiruvatti yūr niṉṟaruḷiya Aruḷāḷap perumāḷai
tiruvārātaṉam paṇṇu nampimāril puṇṭravaṟtaṉattu paṭṭanārāyaṇa paṭṭarum māvaṇṭūrnāṭṭu tūci Akarattu pallāpuratStops here incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 22.260 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
